title: ApplyResult
description: NDJSON output for the atomwrite apply subcommand. Emits one event per file (type: applied) followed by a final summary event (type: summary).

type.description: Event discriminator. 'applied' for the per-file event, 'summary' for the final rollup, 'error' on failure.

path.description: Absolute path of the target file (absent in summary events).

format_detected.description: Patch format that was detected and applied (unified, search-replace, full, markdown, or auto).

hunks_applied.description: Number of patch hunks successfully applied to the file.

bytes_before.description: File size in bytes before applying the patch.

bytes_after.description: File size in bytes after applying the patch.

checksum_before.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the file before applying the patch.

checksum_after.description: BLAKE3 checksum of the file after applying the patch.

mtime_preserved.description: Whether the original mtime was preserved (true) or updated to reflect the change (false). Default is false since v0.1.3+.

dry_run.description: True if the patch was previewed without writing.

files_modified.description: Number of files modified (present in summary event).

files_skipped.description: Number of files skipped (present in summary event).

files_failed.description: Number of files that failed (present in summary event).

error.description: Error message string when type is 'error'.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g. SYNTAX_ERROR) when type is 'error'.
